overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city center. The player character walks through open plazas, covered walkways, and commercial streets filled with holographic advertisements, pedestrians, and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with circular metro kiosk

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the circular metro kiosk while observing the surrounding neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: vendor standing beside a food cart near the metro entrance

entered.detail: futuristic circular building with bright cyan neon trim and glass doors
tall building facade with vertical pink neon lighting
red tables and chairs arranged on the plaza pavement
tall structure covered with multiple large digital advertisements

segments.scene_description: Walking through an open plaza in Night City, approaching a distinctive circular metro kiosk illuminated with cyan neon lights. The area is surrounded by towering buildings covered in digital billboards, with scattered pedestrians and outdoor seating visible on the left.

events.description: enters covered walkway beneath massive concrete building overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the overpass structure, passing between large support pillars

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete ceiling and beams of the building overpass creating a covered walkway
thick concrete pillars lining both sides of the walkway
giant illuminated advertisement visible through the end of the covered section

segments.scene_description: Moving beneath a massive concrete overpass structure that creates a sheltered walkway. The lighting becomes dimmer and more shadowed, with large support pillars lining the path and a giant digital billboard visible at the far end of the tunnel-like space.

events.description: waits at crosswalk then crosses the street as vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the crosswalk, waiting for traffic, then crossing the yellow-striped intersection

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the intersection as the player waits to cross

entered.detail: broad yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
ground floor commercial storefronts with illuminated entrances across the street
orange and white striped barriers lining the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a busy intersection with visible sky between the towering buildings. The player waits for a futuristic sedan to pass before crossing the broad yellow-striped crosswalk toward the commercial district on the opposite side.

events.description: turns right onto the sidewalk and continues walking along the commercial street

agents.ego_description: turning right onto the commercial sidewalk and walking past storefronts and arcade machines

notable_agents.action: person standing on a bollard or pedestal near the crosswalk, possibly a street performer or statue

entered.detail: cluster of glowing arcade game cabinets lined up along the storefront
illuminated vending machines with blue and red lighting
floating holographic displays and large digital billboards covering the building facades

segments.scene_description: Turning right onto a vibrant commercial street lined with glowing arcade machines and vending machines. The street is dense with holographic advertisements covering the buildings, and pedestrians walk along the wide tiled sidewalk while vehicles pass on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrower alleyway, passing by graffiti-covered walls and shop entrances

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in a checkered shirt walking ahead in the same direction down the alley

entered.detail: tall building walls creating a narrow corridor with the street
large colorful graffiti art covering the concrete wall on the left side
various neon signs for shops including a red 'Fuyutsuki' sign

segments.scene_description: Continuing down a narrower commercial alleyway where the buildings create a more enclosed canyon-like space. The walls feature colorful graffiti murals and neon shop signs, while fewer pedestrians are visible in this deeper section of the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit metropolis, moving from an expansive open plaza into the dense, enclosed corridors of a commercial district. It begins by approaching a cyan-illuminated circular metro kiosk surrounded by towering digital billboards and scattered pedestrians, before gliding beneath a massive concrete overpass where the light dims into a shadowed, tunnel-like walkway. As the camera emerges from the shelter, the scene opens into a busy intersection where the player pauses for a futuristic sedan before crossing a broad yellow-striped crosswalk. The path then turns right onto a vibrant commercial street filled with glowing arcade machines and holographic advertisements, finally narrowing into a canyon-like alleyway defined by colorful graffiti murals and intimate neon shop signs.
